title: AN ACT PROVIDING THAT THE STREET IN THE POBLACION OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, AT PRESENT KNOWN AS LIBERTADOR STREET, SHALL HEREAFTER BE KNOWN AS YSULAT STREET.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3076 / 51 OG No. 6, 2802 (June, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1235, June 07, 1955 ]

AN ACT PROVIDING THAT THE STREET IN THE POBLACION OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, AT PRESENT KNOWN AS LIBERTADOR STREET, SHALL HEREAFTER BE KNOWN AS YSULAT STREET.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The street in the poblacion of the Municipality of Dao, Province of Antique, at present known as Libertador Street, shall hereafter be known as Ysulat Street.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 7, 1955.
